query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "gatemem: benchmarking memory governance in multi-principal shared-memo" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the independent variable of "multi-tenant" (multi-principal) memory system behavior and the dependent variable of "memory governance" (specifically page migration control and efficiency) within the same domain of shared memory systems. Although it focuses on the mechanism of migration control rather than the specific "GateMem" benchmark, it provides essential empirical evidence on the dynamics of memory governance in multi-tenant environments tha
